title: MemoSiftMessage
description: The universal message representation used by MemoSift's compression pipeline.

role.description: The message role, matching the OpenAI/Anthropic convention.

content.description: The text content of the message.

name.description: Tool name (for tool messages) or participant name.

tool_call_id.description: Links a tool result back to the assistant's tool_call that triggered it.

tool_calls.description: For assistant messages that invoke tools. Each item has id, function.name, function.arguments.

metadata.description: Framework-specific data preserved through compression. Keys and values are opaque to MemoSift.
